description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs: dmd and ldc. Both run in the default test stage. The dmd job uses the antonmeep/dmd Docker image, executes "./test/run.sh && tail -n1 test/.coverage/silly.lst", and defines a coverage regex "/\d+% covered/". The ldc job uses the antonmeep/ldc Docker image and runs "./test/run.sh". No additional stages, caches, artifacts, or rules are defined.
